meta.fixture_note: Static Day-2 fixture. Standard path: no FairPlay interventions. P-104 seated at T-22 (hour 1, 12-min session, early exit). Cluster P-200 completes formation at T-11 (hour 2). No pit-boss intervention. T-22 promoted normally to new/rec players. All divergence from fairplay path is traceable to decisions in decision_list.json.

field_glossary.hour: Simulation hour (1–8). Hour 0 start state is in room_state_hourly.json.
field_glossary.cumulative_paid_seat_time_minutes: Running total of all player-minutes at active tables from hour 0 to end of this hour.
field_glossary.active_players: Players actively seated at a table at end of this hour.
field_glossary.active_healthy_tables: Tables classified healthy (not fragile/beginner-unfriendly/integrity-candidate) at end of this hour.
field_glossary.new_player_retention_pct: Percentage of new and recreational archetype players who remain actively seated vs. those who have exited prematurely. Running metric from sim start.
field_glossary.avg_casual_session_length_minutes: Mean session length (minutes) for new/recreational players who exited during or before this hour.
field_glossary.early_table_breaks: Cumulative count of tables that broke up ahead of natural end-of-session due to player exodus.
field_glossary.projected_eod_paid_seat_time_minutes: Model projection of total cumulative paid seat-time at end of hour 8, updated each hour.
field_glossary.reward_fee_ratio: Ratio of rewards paid out to rake/time-fees collected this hour. Higher = more balanced reward distribution.
field_glossary.high_risk_seating_formations: Count of active high-risk seating formations (coordinated cluster or predatory-mix) flagged at end of this hour.

hours.hour_note: P-104 seated at T-22 (+5 min); exits after 12-min session (+17 min). T-22 short-handed but retained by P-183/P-184/P-185. Cluster A/B (P-198/P-199) active at T-11 — partial formation flagged.

P-200 seats at T-11 — A/B/C co-seating formation complete. T-22 promotion continues attracting 1 new/rec player who exits within 20 min (second early break). Retention drops as T-22 churn accumulates.

Casual players at T-11 begin exiting under cluster pressure. T-22 flagged fragile/beginner-unfriendly; two more early table breaks. H1/H2 same-device flag (P-192/P-193) surfaces — no action in standard path.

T-22 effectively predatory-mix with outsider exits; T-11 cluster formation entrenched driving casuals out. Third high-risk formation flagged (T-22 predatory-mix reaches integrity threshold). Active players declining.
Compounding casual exodus at T-11 and T-22. New players who arrived mid-session averaging shorter stays. Room unhealthy — fewer tables attracting organic joins.
Active healthy tables drop to 7. T-22 down to 2 players (others exited). Cluster at T-11 still active but room ecosystem is shrinking. Projection converging down.

Room stabilizes at diminished capacity. 8 cumulative early breaks. Natural end-of-session attrition compounds on top of earlier damage. Projection: 25,800 (revised down; model expects final hour ~2,700 min at current active-player rate).
End of 8-hour simulation. Standard path result: 7 healthy tables (of 12 active), 26% new-player retention, 22-min avg casual session, 3 active high-risk formations, 25,700 total paid seat-minutes.
